name: Hayden Haines
title: Account Executive
quote: I've had the pleasure of knowing Tory for years, and what stands out most is his heart for missions. Not a mission work that only appears in distant countries, but the Biblical calling that lives in everyday relationships, in the space between you and the person next to you. Whether in an office or the mountains of Peru, Tory leads with a consistent purpose: to reflect Christ in how he works with people and to help them grow spiritually, personally, and professionally. That integration of faith and leadership is core to who Tory is.
